basic_details.job_title: NHM Mizoram Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 10 Staff Nurse, Driver and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: National Health Mission Mizoram (NHM Mizoram) Various Contractual Posts Notification 2026 has been released on 06 May 2026 on the official website nhmmizoram.org. A total of 10 vacancies have been announced through the NHM Mizoram Various Contractual Posts Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 35 years Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS, BDS, GNM, ANM, Class VIII or above, Valid LMV License. (Details below)
qualification.details: Specialist (ENT): MBBS from a recognized University in India with Post Graduate / Diploma Degree or equivalent in ENT. Permanent registration from the Mizoram State Medical Council. Medical Officer: MBBS from a recognized University in India. Permanent registration from the Mizoram State Medical Council. Dental Surgeon: Bachelor of Dental Surgery (BDS) from Dental College recognised by DCI. Audiologist: Bachelor's Degree in Audiology & Speech Language Pathology (BASLP)/B. Sc (Speech & Hearing) from RCI recognized institute. Staff Nurse/ Palliative Nurse: GNM or above from Govt. recognized institution preferably with Palliative Care course. Staff Nurse: GNM or above from Govt. recognized institution. Preference for local candidates of the area. Health Worker: ANM from a recognized Govt. institution. Preference for local candidates of the area. Driver: Class VIII or above from recognized institution. Valid LMV License. Preference for local candidates of the area.

salary_details.details: Specialist: Rs 70000/- Medical Officer: Rs 50000/- Dental Surgeon: Rs 40,000/- Audiologist: Rs 30000/- Staff Nurse/Palliative Nurse: Rs 19845/- Staff Nurse: Rs 19845/- Health Worker: Rs 14460/- Driver: Rs. 9000/-

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NHM Mizoram Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.nhnmizoram.org.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 22-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for NHM Mizoram Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the NHM Mizoram Various Contractual Posts is 22nd May 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in NHM Mizoram Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 10 vacancies announced for various contractual posts under the National Health Mission Mizoram for the year 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for these posts?
faq.answer: The application mode for the NHM Mizoram Recruitment 2026 is strictly offline. Candidates need to download the form, fill it, and send it to the official address.

faq.question: Q4. What is the minimum and maximum age limit for the posts?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit for all the posts is 18 years, and the maximum age limit is 35 years. Age relaxation will be applicable as per government norms.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary structure for the selected candidates?
faq.answer: The salary for the recruited candidates will range from Rs. 9000/- to Rs. 70000/- per month, depending on the specific post and qualifications.

faq.question: Q6. What are the educational qualifications required for the posts?
faq.answer: Educational qualifications vary by post and include MBBS, BDS, GNM, ANM, Class VIII pass, and a valid LMV license for drivers. Detailed information is available in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for NHM Mizoram Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Written Test followed by a Personal Interview for all eligible candidates who apply for the advertised posts.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for General/OBC candidates?
faq.answer: Yes, General and OBC category candidates are required to pay an application fee of Rs. 100/-. Specific details are mentioned in the official notification.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I download the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of NHM Mizoram, which is www.nhnmizoram.org.

faq.question: Q10. What documents are required to be submitted with the application form?
faq.answer: Candidates need to attach self-attested copies of required documents such as a photograph, signature, ID proof, and relevant educational and experience certificates with the application form.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for NHM Mizoram Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the NHM Mizoram Various Contractual Posts is 22nd May 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this deadline.
